mapper.select: SELECT r.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, rm.room_number, rm.building_id, b.name as building_name, a.real_name as admin_name FROM repair r LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id LEFT JOIN building b ON rm.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user a ON r.admin_id = a.id WHERE r.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, rm.room_number, rm.building_id, b.name as building_name, a.real_name as admin_name FROM repair r LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id LEFT JOIN building b ON rm.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user a ON r.admin_id = a.id WHERE rm.building_id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, rm.room_number, rm.building_id, b.name as building_name, a.real_name as admin_name FROM repair r LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id LEFT JOIN building b ON rm.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user a ON r.admin_id = a.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, rm.room_number, rm.building_id, b.name as building_name, a.real_name as admin_name FROM repair r LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id LEFT JOIN building b ON rm.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user a ON r.admin_id = a.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair (student_id, room_id, title, description, category, priority, status, created_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{roomId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, rm.room_number, rm.building_id, b.name as building_name, a.real_name as admin_name FROM repair r LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id LEFT JOIN building b ON rm.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user a ON r.admin_id = a.id WHERE r.student_id = #{studentId} AND r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, rm.room_number, rm.building_id, b.name as building_name, a.real_name as admin_name FROM repair r LEFT JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN room rm ON r.room_id = rm.id LEFT JOIN building b ON rm.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user a ON r.admin_id = a.id WHERE rm.building_id = #{buildingId} AND r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
